title: RapidMeta Nephrology | HIF-PH Inhibitors for Anemia in CKD (NMA, MACE Safety) v1.0
hero_h2: HIF-Prolyl Hydroxylase Inhibitors for Anemia in Chronic Kidney Disease (Network MA, Cardiovascular Safety)

pico.pop: Adults with chronic kidney disease and anemia (Hb <10 g/dL or eligible per protocol), on dialysis (ASCEND-D, INNO2VATE, HIMALAYAS) or non-dialysis-dependent (ASCEND-ND, PRO2TECT)
pico.int: Oral hypoxia-inducible-factor prolyl-hydroxylase (HIF-PH) inhibitor: daprodustat (ASCEND-D, ASCEND-ND), vadadustat (PRO2TECT, INNO2VATE), or roxadustat (HIMALAYAS)
pico.comp: Recombinant erythropoiesis-stimulating agent (ESA): darbepoetin alfa (ASCEND-ND, PRO2TECT, INNO2VATE) or epoetin alfa (ASCEND-D, HIMALAYAS)
pico.out: First-occurrence major adverse cardiovascular event (MACE: composite of all-cause mortality, non-fatal myocardial infarction, non-fatal stroke; primary safety endpoint, time-to-event HR vs ESA)
pico.subgroup: Dialysis vs non-dialysis-dependent, baseline Hb, prior ESA exposure, geography, age

real_data_entries.name: ASCEND-D
real_data_entries.group: Daprodustat 1-24 mg PO QD vs epoetin alfa in dialysis-dependent CKD; primary safety MACE (time-to-event)

allOutcomes.title: Time to first MACE (primary safety, ESA-controlled)

real_data_entries.snippet: Source: Singh AK et al. NEJM 2021;385:2325-2335 (ASCEND-D daprodustat in dialysis CKD).

real_data_entries.name: ASCEND-ND
real_data_entries.group: Daprodustat 1-24 mg PO QD vs darbepoetin alfa in non-dialysis-dependent CKD; primary safety MACE

allOutcomes.title: Time to first MACE (primary safety, ESA-controlled)

real_data_entries.snippet: Source: Singh AK et al. NEJM 2021;385:2313-2324 (ASCEND-ND daprodustat in NDD CKD).

real_data_entries.name: PRO2TECT
real_data_entries.group: Vadadustat 150-600 mg PO QD vs darbepoetin alfa in non-dialysis-dependent CKD; primary safety MACE -- did NOT meet 1.25 non-inferiority margin

allOutcomes.title: Time to first MACE (primary safety; missed non-inferiority)

real_data_entries.snippet: Source: Chertow GM et al. NEJM 2021;384:1589-1600 (PRO2TECT vadadustat NDD).

real_data_entries.name: INNO2VATE
real_data_entries.group: Vadadustat 150-600 mg PO QD vs darbepoetin alfa in dialysis-dependent CKD; primary safety MACE

allOutcomes.title: Time to first MACE (primary safety, ESA-controlled)

real_data_entries.snippet: Source: Eckardt KU et al. NEJM 2021;384:1601-1612 (INNO2VATE vadadustat dialysis).

real_data_entries.name: HIMALAYAS
real_data_entries.group: Roxadustat 70-100 mg PO TIW vs epoetin alfa in incident dialysis CKD; MACE secondary safety

allOutcomes.title: Time to first MACE (cardiovascular safety, ESA-controlled)

real_data_entries.snippet: Source: Provenzano R et al. JASN 2021;32:737-755 (HIMALAYAS roxadustat incident dialysis).
